	mov A, R7
	jnz jump_7B73
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A31C
	movx A, @DPTR
	inc DPTR
	movx @DPTR, A
	sjmp jump_7B73

jump_7B73:
	mov 64h, #01h	;   1
jump_7B76:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A30D
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnb 0E0h.0, jump_7B8F
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A311
	movx A, @DPTR
	cjne A, #02h, jump_7B87	;   2
	clr A
	mov 64h, A
jump_7B87:
	lcall fwd_66C7_jump_66DC
	mov A, R7
	jnz jump_7B8F
	mov 64h, A
jump_7B8F:
	mov A, 64h
	jz jump_7BD6
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A31A
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #10h	;  16
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A31F
	movx A, @DPTR
	jz jump_7BA3
	cjne A, #01h, jump_7BAE	;   1
jump_7BA3:
	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A5A4
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A31F
	movx A, @DPTR
	sjmp jump_7BBD

jump_7BAE:
	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A5A4
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A31F
jump_7BB6:
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov 0F0h, #03h	;   3
	mul AB
	add A, #0FEh	; 254   -2 'þ'
jump_7BBD:
	mov R7, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A31E
	movx A, @DPTR
	add A, R7
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A5A5
	lcall jump_5AB6
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A319
	movx A, @DPTR
	jb 0E0h.2, jump_7BD3
	lcall jump_50B8
jump_7BD3:
	lcall jump_97C7
jump_7BD6:
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_A312
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	rrc A
	rrc A
	anl A, #3Fh	;  63 '?'
	jnb 0E0h.0, jump_7BF4
	mov A, R7
	anl A, #0FBh	; 251   -5 'û'
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A31A
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0FDh	; 253   -3 'ý'
	movx @DPTR, A
	anl A, #07h	;   7
	jnz jump_7C20
	sjmp jump_7C1D

jump_7BF4:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A31F
	movx A, @DPTR
	inc A
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A31A
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0EFh	; 239  -17 'ï'
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A3B5
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A31F
	movx A, @DPTR
	setb C
	subb A, R7
	jc jump_7C1D
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A28C
	movx A, @DPTR
	cjne A, #01h, jump_7C20	;   1
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A313
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0FBh	; 251   -5 'û'
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

jump_7C1D:
	lcall jump_50A3
jump_7C20:
	ret

	mov R5, #2Fh	;  47 '/'
	lcall jump_4B43
	mov R5, #08h	;   8
	mov R7, #01h	;   1
	lcall jump_52FF
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A311
	mov A, #08h	;   8
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	lcall fwd_6E35_jump_68C0
	clr A
	mov R5, A
	mov R7, A
	lcall jump_53B9
	lcall jump_52FB
	mov DPTR, #dptr_A311
	mov A, #0Ch	;  12
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	nop
	mov R1, 0AFh

end
